tool: computer-use with Chrome Canary plus screencapture
steps: Selected the Conversation mode from the mode rail.
Confirmed the conversation workspace opens inside the cockpit viewport rather than a long page.
Confirmed the message/empty state and input are contained in the left collaborator pane.
Confirmed Pending Actions are visible as a compact queue in the sidecar with an empty-state count.
Confirmed Freeze Agent and Reclaim All are visible in the sidecar and remain consistent with the global safety chrome.
Sent a command through the focused message input using computer-use key events; the transcript rendered user and agent bubbles in the sidecar.
Clicked Freeze Agent and confirmed the sidecar safety state changed to Frozen, the button became Unfreeze Agent, and the global safety chrome also showed Frozen.
Clicked Reclaim All from the sidecar safety strip and confirmed the control remained available without changing the layout.

artifacts.label: conversation sidecar screenshot
artifacts.note: Captured from the visible Chrome Canary window after opening the Conversation workspace.

notes: Accessibility tree showed Agent collaborator sidecar, 0 pending queue badge, Pending agent actions, Safety, Freeze Agent/Reclaim All, Pending Actions, No approvals waiting, and the message input within the conversation workspace.
After sending, the accessibility tree showed YOU/oscillator and AGENT/No commands parsed from that input with confidence in the transcript.
Existing automated tests verify sendAgentMessage, approvePendingAction, rejectPendingAction, toggleFreezeAgent, and reclaimOwnership store flows.
